caption: A woman with wavy brown hair, wearing a light blue collared shirt and a teal blazer, is positioned in an office setting. She is viewed from the chest up, standing in front of a window with closed horizontal blinds. She wears gold hoop earrings and a thin gold necklace. Her expression is one of skeptical anticipation or confusion, as she glances slightly to her right while keeping her body oriented forward. Across the sequence, her gaze shifts subtly, and her facial muscles tighten slightly around her mouth and brow, indicating a reaction to something happening off-screen. The lighting is consistent and bright, reflecting an indoor professional environment. No text, logos, or other people are visible in the frames.
